  
![SeekCindy 
@SeekCindy 
Having toxic parents or a toxic family 
is more challenging than those with 
relatively functional families can 
imagine. Nothing is ever a simple 
conversation. Almost everything is 
riddled with passive aggression, 
subliminals, trauma & projection.
